summary: Base W12 — the §10 test week, reshaped 7-10 (Adj #145/#146): the 5K TT moved Fri → Sun 7-12 per athlete directive. The TT locks the goal tier (≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory) and formally recalibrates T pace after five straight T sessions quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge. Week so far: Mon ran hot (Adj #142); Tue Hyp A set TM 162→168 via the §5 re-test — incline bumps to 150 at W13 Tue (Adj #148–#154); the Wed pre-TT easy ran Thu (honest Z1, HR 180 anomaly — Adj #145); Fri TT skipped. Saturday's full Hyp B is logged: the seated calf ran exactly to the last-set-only cap (12/12/12/13 RIR 2/1/1/0) — headroom restored, 355 bump-eligible next Sat AM-gated (Adj #160); the row ladder cleared (bump-eligible 80, Adj #156); lat took 165 via an accidental 170 start (hold, Adj #155); DB lateral 35 landed on load (Adj #157); everything came back no-issues with a clean elbow — third straight on the §10.A clock. Sunday: 5K TT, full WU with 4 strides; the pre-TT AM Achilles read is the last gate (Adj #146/#163).

days.note: Logged — ran as off-protocol progression: ~3.4 mi / 30:00 @ 8:46 avg (9:16/8:58/8:09/8:23), HR 167 avg / 185 peak, felt chill. No pain anywhere — Adj #135 Achilles recheck satisfied (Adj #142/#143).

Logged (7-10 dump) — fed, AM all-clean. §5 re-test: 145×5 RIR 2 + AMRAP 130×13 RIR 0 → e1RM ~186, TM 162→168; incline bumps 150 at W13 Tue (Adj #148). Rear-delt 135 LANDED (Adj #153); preacher 65 cleanest outing → bump-eligible 70 (Adj #150); pushdown 25 landed, elbow fully clean (Adj #151); crunch +10 debut 12/8/8 — hold, rebuild (Adj #152); DB lat 30 hold (Adj #149).
Not run Wed — session displaced to Thu (Adj #145).

Logged — treadmill ~2.9 mi / 30:00 @ 10:20/mi honest Z1, cadence 173. Strides skipped. Fed; SI / Achilles / patellar clean AM/during/post. HR 180 flat = hottest easy read of the log — single data point, anchor by pace (Adj #145).
SKIPPED — rescheduled to Sun 7-12 (Adj #146). Goal-tier lock and T-pace recalibration move with it.

days.session: Hyp B — full circuit incl. seated calf (athlete call)
days.note: Logged — fed, no issues anywhere, elbow clean 3rd straight (Adj #163). Calf 345 ran to the cap (12/12/12/13 RIR 2/1/1/0) — headroom restored, 355 bump-eligible next Sat AM-gated (Adj #160). Row ladder cleared → bump-eligible 80 (Adj #156). Lat took 165 via a 170 mis-start — hold (Adj #155); DB lat 35 landed on load, rebuild in-band (Adj #157); preacher 60 best outing 12/12/12/8 — hold (Adj #158); pushdown 25 hold (Adj #159); crunch +10 debut 10/8/5 — hold, rebuild (Adj #161); chest fly confounded, no rest between sets — hold 130 (Adj #162).

Goal tier locks: ≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory; 21:31–22:30 = downgrade to 20:59; >22:30 = downgrade to 21:30. Flat course or treadmill 1%, racing intent. Full WU: 15 min easy + 4×20 s strides. Recalibrates T pace. Sat reads came back all-clean — the pre-TT AM Achilles read is the last gate; report an AM-sore read before racing (Adj #146/#163). Do not renegotiate the tier later.
